ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Pansear: red-coated fire-type monkey with cream head tuft matches sm3-22 record and Bulbapedia Elemental monkeys article.

trivia_bullets.text: Pansear represents 'hear no evil' in the elemental monkey trio's three-wise-monkeys design conceit; Panpour = see no evil, Pansage = speak no evil. All three share identical base stats.
Burning Shadows (SM3) released August 5, 2017; elemental monkeys appear as straightforward Unova commons in an Alolan-era set headlined by Marshadow and Necrozma.
"Very intelligent, it roasts berries before eating them. It likes to help people." — fire-type culinary behavior and cooperative disposition.
In Black and White, the player receives a Pansear as a gift in the Dreamyard if they chose Oshawott as their starter, providing fire-type coverage against the first gym.

related_cards.name: Panpour
related_cards.note: Water-arm of the trio, same set
